_comment: circuit-node-client configuration. Edit before first run.

node._agentNote: Set agentDataPath to your circuit-agent/data directory to connect an agent. E.g.: "../circuit-agent/data"

access._stakingNote: Stake CIRC to unlock free RPC access. Set stakingPool to the Circuit pool address from stakepoint.app.

updates._signingNote: Operator public key for verifying signed updates. Set by generate-signing-key.js output. Leave null to skip verification (not recommended for production).

chat._note: Chat is provided by the connected circuit-agent. No LLM key needed here — the agent's own llm.openrouterKey is used automatically.

llmWorker._enabledNote: Set to true to join the Circuit decentralized LLM inference network. Your node will receive a transformer layer shard and earn CIRC for compute.
llmWorker._portNote: TCP port the coordinator connects to for tensor pipeline. Must be unique per node. HTTP weight-delivery port = this port + 1000.
llmWorker._keyNote: Shared secret for coordinator authentication. Required for remote coordinators. Must match coordinator clusterKey.
llmWorker._hostNote: Public IP or hostname the coordinator can reach to open the TCP tensor pipeline. Required if your machine is behind NAT. Example: '203.0.113.42' or 'mynode.example.com'. Leave blank if running on the same machine as the coordinator.
llmWorker._walletNote: Your Solana wallet address for CIRC payment attribution. If set, you earn a share of inference fees proportional to layers you run.
